change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after primary prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate lowered the auto chunk-tuning minimum from 1025 to 513 max-sequence tokens, causing 512/128-class sessions to resolve the retained 1024/4096 mid-context prefill chunk sizes instead of staying below-min/unchunked.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 114.735831 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: 512/128 prefill regressed sharply and both decode medians regressed versus retained baseline; the tiny 4K prefill nudge did not offset primary decode/prefill regressions.
